name: Replimune Group, Inc.
summary: Replimune Group, Inc. is a clinical-stage biotechnology company developing oncolytic immunotherapies for cancer treatment. Its proprietary RPx platform is based on an engineered HSV-1 backbone designed to maximize immunogenic cell death and systemic anti-tumor immune response. Lead product RP1 (vusolimogene oderparepvec) is being evaluated in melanoma and non-melanoma skin cancers, with a BLA submitted to the FDA in combination with nivolumab for anti-PD-1 failed advanced melanoma, granted priority review with a PDUFA date of July 22, 2025.

products.name: RP1 (vusolimogene oderparepvec)
products.description: Lead oncolytic immunotherapy candidate based on engineered HSV-1; being evaluated in melanoma and non-melanoma skin cancers, including in combination with nivolumab; BLA submitted under accelerated approval pathway.

products.name: RP2
products.description: Second RPx platform-based oncolytic immunotherapy candidate currently in clinical development pipeline.

products.name: RP3
products.description: Third RPx platform-based oncolytic immunotherapy candidate currently in clinical development pipeline.

products.name: RPx Platform
products.description: Proprietary engineered HSV-1 backbone platform designed for oncolytic immunotherapy with dual local and systemic anti-tumor activity.

partnerships.description: BMS granted non-exclusive royalty-free license and supplies nivolumab at no cost for use in combination with RP1 in the IGNYTE clinical trial.
